name: @benchmarks/effectful-list
description: effectful-list bench: a 1k-row keyed table whose every row carries useEffect/useLayoutEffect/shared-callback-ref lifecycle machinery; harness measures mount_1k / update_nodeps / update_deps / clear / remount / remove_100_scattered across octane-tsrx, octane-jsx, react, solid and ripple, gated on analytic effect-counter expectations.
